zh.Eccleswall, Herefordshire, England: 英國賀福爾艾可萊斯瓦爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Boteler於1272年出生在英國史洛普爾維姆時，她的父親Sir William le Boteler33歲，母親Princess Angharad Verch Gruffudd27歲。她於1300年與Gilbert Talbot 1st Lord Talbot在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1340年在英國賀福爾艾可萊斯瓦爾享年68歲，埋葬在英國賀福爾賀福德。

zh-hans.Eccleswall, Herefordshire, England: 英国賀福爾艾可萊斯瓦爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Boteler于1272年出生在英国史洛普爾維姆时，她的父亲Sir William le Boteler33岁，母亲Princess Angharad Verch Gruffudd27岁。她于1300年与Gilbert Talbot 1st Lord Talbot在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1340年在英国賀福爾艾可萊斯瓦爾享年68岁，埋葬在英国賀福爾賀福德。

nameMeanings.name: Boteler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a maker of leather bottles, from an agent derivative of Middle English botel, Old French bouteille ‘bottle’.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Boteler was born in 1272, in Wem, Shropshire, England, her father, Sir William le Boteler, was 33 and her mother, Princess Angharad Verch Gruffudd, was 27. She married Gilbert Talbot 1st Lord Talbot in 1300, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died in 1340, in Eccleswall, Herefordshire, England, at the age of 68, and was buried in Hereford, Herefordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Boteler est née en 1272, à Wem, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William le Boteler, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Princess Angharad Verch Gruffudd, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Gilbert Talbot 1st Lord Talbot en 1300, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1340, à Eccleswall, Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterrée à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Boteler 1272 in Wem, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William le Boteler 33 und ihre Mutter Princess Angharad Verch Gruffudd 27. Sie hat 1300 in England Gilbert Talbot 1st Lord Talbot geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1340 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Eccleswall, Herefordshire, England und wurde in Hereford, Herefordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Boteler è nata il nel 1272 nel Wem, Shropshire, England, sua padre, Sir William le Boteler, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Princess Angharad Verch Gruffudd, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Gilbert Talbot 1st Lord Talbot nel 1300, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1340, nel Eccleswall, Herefordshire, England, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolta a Hereford, Herefordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Botelerが1272年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアウエムで生まれた時，父Sir William le Botelerは33歳，母Princess Angharad Verch Gruffuddは27歳であった。1300年にイギリスでGilbert Talbot 1st Lord Talbotと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1340年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアエククレスワルで68歳で死去し，イギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Boteler(이)가 1272년 영국 슈럽실르 베에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William le Boteler(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Princess Angharad Verch Gruffudd(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1300년 영국에서 Gilbert Talbot 1st Lord Talbot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1340년 영국 허퍼드실르 치레스월에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에 묻혔다.

mn.Timperley, Cheshire, England: Timperley, Legeceasterscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Boteler nasceu em 1272, em Wem, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William le Boteler, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Princess Angharad Verch Gruffudd, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Gilbert Talbot 1st Lord Talbot em 1300, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1340, em Eccleswall, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, com 68 anos, e foi sepultada em Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Boteler родилась в 1272 г. в местности вем, шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William le Boteler было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Princess Angharad Verch Gruffudd, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gilbert Talbot 1st Lord Talbot в 1300 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1340 г. в местности экклесвалл, хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 68 лет и была похоронена в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Boteler nació en 1272, en Wem, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William le Boteler, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Princess Angharad Verch Gruffudd, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Gilbert Talbot 1st Lord Talbot en 1300, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió en 1340, en Eccleswall, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultada en Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.
